name: python_lint_checker
description: Analyzes Python files for unused imports, likely bugs, style violations, and complexity issues. No execution — pure static analysis.

path.description: Python file or directory to analyze. Example: '/Users/me/project/src'

checks.description: Comma-separated check categories to run: imports, bugs, style, complexity. Default: 'all'. Example: 'bugs,imports'

max_line_length.description: Maximum line length before STY001 triggers. Default: 88 (matches black/ruff). Example: 120

max_findings.description: Maximum number of findings to return. Summary counts are always complete. Default: 200. Use summary_only=true for large repos.

summary_only.description: Return only summary counts — no per-file findings. Fast and compact for large repos. Default: false.
